name: 做报告
description: 你在会议或系里 workshop 做英文报告，需要自然开场、说明结构、讲清图表、收束贡献并邀请提问。

dialogues.title: 开场介绍
dialogues.context: 主持人刚介绍完你，你需要接过话头、感谢邀请，并说明报告主题。

lines.speaker: chair
lines.en: Please join me in welcoming Wenbo, who will present work on education and family change.

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Thank you so much for the introduction, and thanks everyone for being here. Today I'm going to talk about how educational expansion reshapes family formation.
lines.zh: 非常感谢介绍，也谢谢大家来听。今天我想讲的是教育扩张如何重塑家庭形成。
highlights: Today I'm going to talk about

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: I'll start with the motivation, then briefly describe the data and methods, and I'll spend most of the time on the results.
lines.zh: 我会先讲研究动机，然后简要介绍数据和方法，最后把大部分时间放在结果上。
highlights: spend most of the time on

dialogues.title: 解释图表
dialogues.context: 你切到一页趋势图，需要引导听众看横轴、纵轴和关键差异。

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Let me draw your attention to the right-hand panel first. The y-axis shows predicted probabilities, and the lines separate respondents by parental education.
lines.zh: 我先请大家看右边这一栏。纵轴是预测概率，几条线按照父母教育水平区分。

lines.speaker: audience
lines.en: Are those adjusted predictions from the full model?

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Yes, exactly. These are adjusted predictions from the full model, so the gap you see here is net of age, cohort, and region.
lines.zh: 对，没错。这些是完整模型的调整后预测值，所以这里看到的差距已经控制了年龄、队列和地区。

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: The main takeaway is that the gap widens rather than narrows over time.
lines.zh: 最主要的一点是，这个差距随着时间扩大，而不是缩小。

dialogues.title: 收尾总结
dialogues.context: 你讲到最后一页，需要快速总结发现、说明贡献并邀请提问。

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Let me wrap up with three points. First, educational expansion has not eliminated family background differences.
lines.zh: 我用三点来收尾。第一，教育扩张并没有消除家庭背景差异。

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Second, the mechanism seems to run through field of study rather than enrollment alone.
lines.zh: 第二，机制似乎主要通过专业选择发挥作用，而不只是是否入学。
highlights: the mechanism seems to run through

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: I'll stop there, and I look forward to your questions and comments.
lines.zh: 我就讲到这里，期待大家的问题和建议。
highlights: look forward to your questions and comments

lines.speaker: chair
lines.en: Thank you. We have time for questions.

expressions.en: Thank you so much for the introduction.
expressions.note: 接主持人介绍最自然，礼貌但不拖沓

expressions.en: It's a pleasure to be here.
expressions.note: 更正式，适合受邀报告或 workshop

expressions.en: I'm very happy to have the chance to share this work.
expressions.note: 比 pleasure 更亲近，适合中小型场合

expressions.en: I'll start with the motivation.
expressions.note: 结构清楚，适合开场说明第一部分

expressions.en: I'll then move on to the data and methods.
expressions.note: 自然承接下一部分，适合路线图

expressions.en: I'll spend most of the time on the results.
expressions.note: 提前管理听众预期，突出重点部分

universalExpressions.meaning: 引导听众注意力 / 过渡到下一部分

expressions.en: Let me turn now to...
expressions.note: 正式且顺滑，适合章节转换

expressions.en: This brings me to...
expressions.note: 强调前一部分自然引出下一部分

expressions.en: Before I show the results, let me briefly explain...
expressions.note: 适合补充必要背景，避免听众跟不上

expressions.en: Let me draw your attention to...
expressions.note: 最常用的图表引导，礼貌且明确

expressions.en: If you look at the left-hand panel...
expressions.note: 适合多图并列时定位听众视线

expressions.en: The key comparison here is between...
expressions.note: 直接告诉听众该看哪里，效率高

expressions.en: The y-axis shows...
expressions.note: 解释图表元素最清楚，适合先铺垫读图方式

expressions.en: What stands out is...
expressions.note: 突出最重要现象，避免逐项念图

expressions.en: The gap widens over time.
expressions.note: 简洁描述趋势，适合动态比较

expressions.en: The main takeaway is...
expressions.note: 适合从结果中提炼重点，听众友好

expressions.en: The important point here is...
expressions.note: 比 main takeaway 更直接，适合强调解释

expressions.en: This is the result I want to highlight.
expressions.note: 适合图表多、信息密度高时抓重点

expressions.en: Let me wrap up with three points.
expressions.note: 收尾时结构清楚，适合正式报告

expressions.en: To summarize, we find that...
expressions.note: 直接回到核心发现，适合最后一页

expressions.en: Taken together, these results suggest...
expressions.note: 适合把多个结果合并成总体解释

expressions.en: I'll stop there.
expressions.note: 最自然的结束信号，简洁不僵硬

expressions.en: I look forward to your questions and comments.
expressions.note: 正式且友好，适合学术报告结尾

expressions.en: I'm happy to take questions.
expressions.note: 口语自然，适合时间较短的报告
